LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF REALTYSHARES 245, LLC, REALTYSHARES 258, LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS THE FOLLOWING TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF REALTYSHARES 245, LLC, REALTYSHARES 258, LLC' S UNOPPOSED "PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD" IS GRANTED. JUDGE: RICHARD B, ULMER JR., CLERK: R. WOODS, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU) ***AFTER HEARING: ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

Off Calendar Jun-28-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Plaintiff REALTYSHARES 245, LLC, REALTYSHARES 258, LLC's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court adopts the following tentative ruling:

Plaintiff REALTYSHARES 245, LLC, REALTYSHARES 258, LLC' s unopposed "petition to confirm arbitration award" is granted.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
